title: Computer Science Cheat Sheet

commands.description: View a log of all recent changes to the HEAD, allowing you to recover lost commits or undo accidental hard resets.
Find the Process ID (PID) and detailed status of a specific running process to assist in debugging or killing hung tasks.
Remove all unused containers, networks, images (both dangling and unused), and optionally volumes to reclaim disk space.
Locate and delete files ending in .log that were last modified more than 7 days ago to automate log rotation/cleanup.

commands.command: EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT * FROM table_name WHERE id = 1;
commands.description: Execute a query and show the actual execution plan, including timing, to identify performance bottlenecks in SQL queries.
